name: Brawlers Arena Battle Stars
description: Brawlers Arena Battle Stars is a perfect game for everyone who wants to try their luck, collect a collection of Brawlers and have fun in an exciting world. Join the battle in the exciting game Brawlers Arena Battle Stars! Deal with enemies, complete levels and open new arenas! The game offers iconic characters with unique characteristics, interesting weapons with different operating principles. Immerse yourself in various interesting locations that will not let you get bored. Each level is a new challenge for you. Move forward, improve your skills and get well-deserved rewards for loyalty and courage in the battle.
instructions: Computer controls WASD - move The character will automatically start shooting when approaching the enemy Phone controls On-screen joystick for movement The character will automatically start shooting when approaching the enemy
tags: Action, amazing, Arcade, attack, Battlegrounds, Brawl, Casual, destruction, gta, Gun, Hypercasual, Level, Shooter, Shooting
